# scripts/load_test_smoke.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:00:25Z

## Purpose
Load test smoke · Iter 55 · async concurrent + p50/p95/p99 + cost.

Writes report to jobs/reports/load-testing/load-YYYYMMDD_HHMM.md
which the Top-1% scorecard (Iter 54) reads.

Cron: weekly Sunday 03:00 UTC · INSUR-LOAD-TEST
Manual: ./scripts/insur load-test

### Functions
- `async run_one(client, target_url, idx)`: Single request · returns latency + status.
- `async phase(name, target_url, n_concurrent, duration_s)`: Run a phase · concurrent loop for duration_s seconds.

- `main()`: (no docstring)
